title: SlackChannelConfig
description: TOML config for one wcore-channel-slack instance. Secrets are keychain-handles only.

workspace_name.description: Human-readable workspace label (e.g. "acme"). Used for logging only.

default_channel_id.description: Optional Slack channel/conversation ID used when OutgoingMessage.conversation_id is empty.

credential_handle_bot_token.description: Key used to look up the Bot User OAuth Token (xoxb-...) in the CredentialsStore.

credential_handle_signing_secret.description: Key used to look up the Slack app signing secret in the CredentialsStore.

api_base_url.description: Override for the Slack Web API base URL. Defaults to https://slack.com — tests inject a mockito URL here.

max_retry_attempts.description: Number of attempts (including the first) before giving up on transient failures.
